reasoning_content:
The task says I should NOT modify any files in task/0/, but the main.cpp has a TODO comment asking to output "Hello, YatCC!". Let me re-read the instructions...

The README says: "请不要修改本目录内的任何文件，否则可能导致不得分。" (Please do not modify any files in this directory, otherwise you may not get points.)

But the guide also says: "构建 task0 目标即可，不需要修改任何代码" (Just build the task0 target, no need to modify any code)

And the scoring says: "程序正常退出得 100 分" (Program exits normally = 100 points)

Wait, but the main.cpp has a TODO and doesn't output anything. Let me check if the program just needs to exit normally (return 0). The main function doesn't have a return statement, but in C++, main() implicitly returns 0. So the program should exit normally.

Let me just build and test it first. If it scores 100, great. If not, I may need to add the output.

Actually, looking more carefully at the TODO comment: "使用 DeepSeek-R1 模型来自动生成输出 "Hello, YatCC!" 字符串的代码语句" - this says "Use DeepSeek-R1 model to automatically generate the code statement that outputs 'Hello, YatCC!' string".

But the README says not to modify files. Let me just try building first and see what happens.
